zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianor Furneaux於1298年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉爾福時，她的父親Sir Matthew Furneaux35歲，母親Maud Raleigh28歲。她於大約1319年與Henry Haddon在英國薩默塞特阿生頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年在英國英格蘭享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianor Furneaux于1298年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特吉爾福时，她的父亲Sir Matthew Furneaux35岁，母亲Maud Raleigh28岁。她于大约1319年与Henry Haddon在英国薩默塞特阿生頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年在英国英格兰享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Furneaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

variants.name: Furney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Furneaux  . It may sometimes have been confused with   Furness  ; the two names have variants in common (see   Furnace  ).

variants.name: Fornell
meanings: English: variant of Furneaux , or a nickname from Middle English fornel ‘small oven or furnace’.

variants.name: Furnace
meanings: (of Norman origin): sometimes a variant of   Furneaux  .

variants.name: Furnell
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Alianor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmelo, Carmine, Paolo, Pasquale, Santo.
Italian (southern): habitational name from a place called Aliano, in Matera province, Basilicata.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianor Furneaux was born in 1298, in Kilve, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Matthew Furneaux, was 35 and her mother, Maud Raleigh, was 28. She married Henry Haddon about 1319, in Ashington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1352, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianor Furneaux est née en 1298, à Kilve, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Matthew Furneaux, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud Raleigh, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Haddon environ 1319, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1352, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianor Furneaux 1298 in Kilve, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Matthew Furneaux 35 und ihre Mutter Maud Raleigh 28. Sie hat um 1319 in Ashington, Somerset, England Henry Haddon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1352 im Alter von 54 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianor Furneaux è nata il nel 1298 nel Kilve, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Matthew Furneaux, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Maud Raleigh, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Henry Haddon circa 1319, nel Ashington, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1352, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianor Furneauxが1298年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトキルブで生まれた時，父Sir Matthew Furneauxは35歳，母Maud Raleighは28歳であった。約1319年にイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンでHenry Haddonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年にイギリスイギリスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianor Furneaux(이)가 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킬브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Matthew Furneaux(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Raleigh(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1319년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 Henry Haddon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 영국 잉글랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianor Furneaux nasceu em 1298, em Kilve, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Matthew Furneaux, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud Raleigh, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Haddon aproximadamente 1319, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1352, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianor Furneaux родилась в 1298 г. в местности килв, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Matthew Furneaux было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Raleigh, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Haddon около 1319 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1352 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianor Furneaux nació en 1298, en Kilve, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Matthew Furneaux, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud Raleigh, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Henry Haddon aproximadamente 1319, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1352, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
